description_long: This is a marble chess table with a square playing surface supported by a thick, rectangular pedestal base. The board features a classic black-and-white checkered pattern, with alternating squares that are sharply defined and highly contrasting. The chess pieces are set up for a game, with one side rendered in a glossy black material and the other in a reflective, silvery metallic finish, each piece distinct in shape and detail. The table's border is made of the same speckled marble as the base, providing a sturdy and elegant frame around the playing area. The overall construction appears robust and heavy, suitable for outdoor or public park settings. The surface is smooth and polished, giving the table a refined and durable appearance.
description: A marble chess table with a black-and-white checkered board and contrasting black and silver chess pieces, supported by a solid marble pedestal. The surface is polished and the border is thick and speckled, giving it a refined, durable look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full chessboard with all pieces in starting positions, highlighting the black pieces on the left and silver pieces on the right.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the silver pieces in the foreground and the black pieces in the background, with the marble border clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the silver pieces on the left and black pieces on the right, emphasizing the symmetry of the board and the marble construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with black pieces in the foreground and silver pieces in the background, showing the thickness of the marble border and pedestal.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, each square perfectly aligned and sharply bordered, set within a thick, speckled marble frame. The pattern is classic and geometric, with no additional decorative elements or inscriptions on the playing area itself.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, speckled marble band that surrounds the entire playing area, matching the pedestal base in material and color. It is smooth, polished, and unadorned, with no visible inscriptions or ornamentation, providing a clean and elegant frame for the board.
